title: entandrophragma utile
intro: Entandrophragma utile, also known as the African mahogany, is a species of deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Entandrophragma utile include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and it is also used in the production of traditional medicine in various forms, including powders and capsules.
